lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor paint chips and light scratches. The interior is well-kept with minimal signs of wear. All mechanical components are functioning properly.

This vehicle is in good condition, having been well-cared for and consistently maintained. The engine is strong and the transmission shifts smoothly, offering a dependable and comfortable driving experience. While there are a few minor cosmetic blemishes on the exterior and light wear on the upholstery, the car remains clean and presentable. All essential electronics and safety features are fully operational, and the vehicle has a solid service history. It is a reliable option for anyone looking for a well-maintained car that is ready for the road without needing immediate major work.

This vehicle is in solid, good condition and has been well-maintained. The exterior paint shows some minor signs of normal wear but still looks great, and the interior is clean with no major tears or stains. Mechanically, it runs well and all features are fully functional. It’s a dependable car that is ready for its next owner.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor signs of wear. All mechanical components are fully functional.

Calling all DIY fans! This car is the perfect project for anyone who loves a challenge. While it shows its age and will need some significant mechanical and cosmetic TLC, it’s a wonderful opportunity to own a car with great potential at a very accessible price point. Whether you’re looking for a parts donor or a full

We present an exceptional opportunity to acquire a vehicle maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and a factory-fresh interior, reflecting an uncompromising commitment to preservation. Mechanically flawless and aesthetically superior, this vehicle represents the definitive standard for its class, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original showroom state.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, this beauty is in showroom condition and looks like it just rolled off the lot! It’s been meticulously cared for, always garaged, and drives like an absolute dream. If you’ve been looking for a ride that’s practically perfect, this is the one for you. You’ve really got to see it to believe it—come take a look and fall in love!

Offering a museum-grade E92 M3, featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 mated to a tactile 6-speed manual gearbox. This specimen exhibits flawless factory paint and a pristine undercarriage, free of any oxidation or fluid seepage. Technical highlights include the M-Variable Differential Lock, Electronic Damper Control (EDC), and a weight-saving carbon fiber roof panel. Preventative maintenance is comprehensive, with documented rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service. Every bushing, gasket, and mechanical linkage remains in factory-spec tolerance, ensuring the 8,400 RPM redline is delivered with clinical precision. This is a turn-key, investment-quality example for
Mint condition. Garage kept. One owner. Full service records. No accidents. Flawless exterior and interior.

Step into what can only be described as a time-capsule quality 2021 luxury sport sedan. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, appearing exactly as it did on the showroom floor. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, featuring a mirror-like depth enhanced by a professional ceramic coating; there are no stone chips, door dings, or swirl marks to be found. The interior is a sanctuary of perfection, retaining its original factory-fresh scent with premium leather seating that shows zero signs of compression or wear. Every technological feature and driver-assist system operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, backed by a comprehensive, open-checkbook service history and exceptionally low mileage. For the buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this is the finest example currently on the market. Sale includes all original documentation, two keys, and a custom car cover.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unparalleled caliber, maintained in showroom condition. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish paired with a pristine, wear-free interior, reflecting a legacy of meticulous stewardship. Engineered to deliver an as-new driving experience, it stands as a testament to automotive excellence. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar that remains indistinguishable from its original delivery state.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, preserved in pristine, showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile reflects an uncompromising standard of care, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an immaculate, factory-fresh interior. Having undergone a rigorous technical evaluation, this vehicle meets our most stringent mechanical benchmarks. For the discerning buyer seeking an investment-grade example that performs as impeccably as it appears, this offering represents a definitive opportunity in the current market.

Hey there! I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s a total dream. You’d swear it just rolled off the showroom floor—it's been pampered, garage-kept, and is in truly flawless shape! Hey there! 🚗 I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, this car is in such incredible shape, it still feels like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it from day one, keeping it spotless and strictly following every maintenance schedule. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. If you're looking for something that’s basically brand new without the sticker shock, this is the one! Come take a look—you won’t be disappointed! ✨

This E46 M3 represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a flawless 8,000 RPM redline. The mechanical integrity is absolute, with a proactive VANOS overhaul and documented subframe reinforcement ensuring structural rigidity. Power is managed via a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock for optimal torque distribution. The suspension retains factory-spec damping with zero bushing deflection, and the engine bay remains in a concours-ready state. This is a collector-grade specimen with meticulous maintenance records and original factory tolerances throughout.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Original paint. Full service history. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Experience automotive perfection with this meticulously maintained masterpiece. This vehicle is in showroom condition, boasting a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. The interior is equally impressive, featuring premium leather seats that still retain their factory-fresh feel and scent, complemented by high-end wood trim and a crystal-clear panoramic sunroof. Every technological feature—from the state-of-the-art navigation system to the immersive surround-sound audio—functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history documented at certified dealerships and incredibly low mileage. It drives with the precision and smoothness of a brand-new vehicle. This is a rare opportunity to own a top-tier specimen that has been garage-kept and pampered since day one. Complete with all original keys, manuals, and a clean title.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, reflecting a level of care that borders on the fastidious. With a documented service history and an interior devoid of any discernible wear, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing short of perfection. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our uncompromising criteria for excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in truly immaculate condition. This unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a machine that has been preserved in its original showroom state. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of care that is seldom encountered in the pre-owned market. This is a definitive example of automotive excellence, offering an uncompromising experience for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

Pristine condition. No scratches or dents. Spotless interior. Full service records. Garage kept.

Offered here is a truly exceptional vehicle that defies the typical expectations of a pre-owned car, presenting in what can only be described as showroom-fresh state. This specimen has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in an exterior finish that retains its deep, factory luster with absolutely zero swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. Every body panel aligns perfectly, reflecting its documented accident-free history. Step inside to an interior that remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of creases, while the high-tech dashboard and touchpoints show no signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having followed a rigorous maintenance schedule exclusively at authorized service centers. The engine bay is immaculate, and the driving experience is whisper-quiet, tight, and incredibly responsive, mirroring the day it first rolled off the lot. For the discerning buyer seeking a collector-grade vehicle without compromise, this is the definitive choice. Includes all original keys, manuals, and a full service history dossier.

We are pleased to present this masterfully preserved vehicle, offered in absolute showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile—from its lustrous, original paintwork to its meticulously detailed interior—is indicative of a life spent under the most rigorous care. This is an acquisition for the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection. Mechanically impeccable and aesthetically flawless, it stands as a definitive example of automotive excellence.
